# Barnaby Snipe — site summary for language models

Barnaby Snipe is presented on this site as a writer of dry, socially observant comic fiction.
The current book featured on the site is Herb Aplenty.

## Author positioning
Barnaby Snipe writes dry, socially observant comic fiction about island life, human appetite, and the trouble communities make for themselves.

## Current book
Title: Herb Aplenty
Strapline: A comic novel of island chaos, shortage and temptation.
Author: Barnaby Snipe
Retailer link: https://www.amazon.co.uk/dp/B0FRZV2W82

## Short description
When an island runs dry, private habits turn into public weather. Rumour spreads, dignity frays, outsiders complicate matters, and a community that likes to think it knows itself begins to show its workings. Herb Aplenty is a comic novel of shortage, temptation, local friction, and the trouble people make for themselves when relief sits just out of reach.

## Site sections
- Homepage: author overview, current book, navigation to the main sections
- About: author description and writing focus
- Books: current published title
- Contact: reader enquiries, rights, and general contact route
- Privacy: current site privacy and hosting notes

## Contact note
The contact email shown on the live pages may be a placeholder until the site owner replaces it with the preferred address.
